entities.name: SOIL RESPIRATION
entities.description: Biological soil quality indicator measuring the release of carbon dioxide from the soil

entities.name: MICROBIAL BIOMASS
entities.description: Biological soil quality indicator measuring the mass of living microorganisms in the soil

entities.name: BIOMASS NITROGEN
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen contained within the microbial biomass

entities.name: C:N RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of total carbon to total nitrogen in the soil

entities.name: NET MINERALIZATION
entities.description: The net rate of conversion of organic nitrogen to inorganic nitrogen

entities.name: MICROORGANISM POPULATION
entities.description: The total count or density of microorganisms in the soil

entities.name: TOTAL CARBON
entities.description: The sum of all carbon forms present in the soil

entities.name: ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: Carbon found in organic compounds within the soil

entities.name: INORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: Carbon found in inorganic forms within the soil

entities.name: TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: The sum of all nitrogen forms present in the soil

entities.name: GOLESTAN PROVINCE
entities.description: A province in northeast Iran where the soil study was conducted

entities.name: IRAN
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: ARIDIC-THERMIC REGIME
entities.description: A soil moisture and temperature regime characterized by arid conditions

entities.name: XERIC-THERMIC REGIME
entities.description: A soil moisture and temperature regime characterized by xeric conditions

entities.name: UDIC-MESIC REGIME
entities.description: A soil moisture and temperature regime characterized by udic conditions

entities.name: LOESS
entities.description: Wind-deposited silt parent material from which the studied soils formed

entities.name: RANGELANDS
entities.description: Sparse natural vegetation found in the northern arid parts of the region

entities.name: DECIDUOUS FOREST
entities.description: Dense natural vegetation found in the southern humid regions

entities.name: ALBORZ MOUNTAIN RANGES
entities.description: Mountain range in northern Iran influencing the local climate and vegetation

entities.name: ARIDISOLS
entities.description: Soil order typical of arid moisture regimes

entities.name: ENTISOLS
entities.description: Soil order with little or no profile development found in arid moisture regimes

entities.name: INCEPTISOLS
entities.description: Soil order with incipient profile development found in xeric moisture regimes

entities.name: MOLLISOLS
entities.description: Soil order characterized by a thick, dark surface layer found in xeric moisture regimes

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: Soil order characterized by a clay-enriched subsoil found in udic moisture regimes

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: The amount of rainfall which influences soil carbon, nitrogen, and pH

entities.name: PH
entities.description: The measure of acidity or alkalinity of the soil

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Single-celled microorganisms whose population trend followed biological soil quality attributes

entities.name: ACTINOMYCETES
entities.description: Gram-positive bacteria whose population trend followed biological soil quality attributes
